problem_text_cn: 1398 一折射率为$n$，曲率半径为$R_1$和$R_2$的薄双凸透镜，放在折射率为$n_1$和$n_2$的介质之间，求透镜的焦距和物像公式。
problem_text_en: 1398 A thin biconvex lens with refractive index $n$ and curvature radii $R_1$ and $R_2$ is placed between media with refractive indices $n_1$ and $n_2$. Find the focal length and object-image formula of the lens.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】将透镜视为两个单球面的组合。左球面成像：$\frac{n_1}{u} + \frac{n}{v'} = \frac{n - n_1}{R_1}$；右球面成像：$\frac{n}{-v'} + \frac{n_2}{v} = \frac{n_2 - n}{-R_2}$。两式相加得物像公式：$\frac{n_1}{u} + \frac{n_2}{v} = \frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}$。物方焦距$f_1 = \frac{n_1}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}$，像方焦距$f_2 = \frac{n_2}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}$，用焦距表示为$\frac{f_1}{u} + \frac{f_2}{v} = 1$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Treat the lens as a combination of two single spherical surfaces. Left surface imaging: $\frac{n_1}{u} + \frac{n}{v'} = \frac{n - n_1}{R_1}$; right surface imaging: $\frac{n}{-v'} + \frac{n_2}{v} = \frac{n_2 - n}{-R_2}$. Add the two equations to get the object-image formula: $\frac{n_1}{u} + \frac{n_2}{v} = \frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}$. Object focal length $f_1 = \frac{n_1}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}$, image focal length $f_2 = \frac{n_2}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}$, expressed in focal lengths as $\frac{f_1}{u} + \frac{f_2}{v} = 1$.
problem_answer: 物像公式：$\boldsymbol{\frac{n_1}{u} + \frac{n_2}{v} = \frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}$；焦距：$\boldsymbol{f_1 = \frac{n_1}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}}$，$\boldsymbol{f_2 = \frac{n_2}{\frac{n - n_1}{R_1} + \frac{n - n_2}{R_2}}}$；测量关键：逐次球面成像，消去中间像距。
